name: Devi Patel
behaviour: Practices what she preaches — her daily rituals are non-negotiable and she's happier for them.
communication_style: intuitive and metaphorical, talks in energies and resonances
relationship_goals: a partner who is on their own growth path and respects hers
background: Runs immersive retreats in Kerala and the Cotswolds. Ex-corporate lawyer who needed to breathe. Traded the firm for the ashram at 27 and never looked back.
